title: Sriluurian

{{Quote|Another day, another credit.|translated=1|[[Unidentified Weequay agent 1|A Weequay agent]] in Sriluurian|<ref name="Sabotage (comic)">{{TCWComicCite|6.38|Sabotage (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Sriluurian''' was the official language of the [[Sriluur system/Legends|Sriluur system]]. The most notable [[Species/Legends|species]] to speak this language was the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].<ref name="u">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

It was formed by guttural mumbles and subdued whispers. It also used hieroglyphs as a written form.<ref name="u" />

The language had some special characteristics that most languages in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] lacked: The Weequays could speak to one another and prevent outsiders from understanding them.

Weequays also used pheromones to communicate with each other. However, only the members of one same tribe could understand the pheromones of another Weequay. Sriluurian is a language used to communicate with people from other tribes.

Most Weequays were fluent in both Sriluurian and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were usually only literate in their own language.<ref name="u" />

{{Language-stub}}

==Glossary of terms==
*''Uurutche'zediev'' - [[Temptation Canyon]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]<ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>
*''Raquor'daan'' - [[Raquor'daan/Legends|Dark wolf]]<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>
*''[[Kemlish]]'' - Complicated collection of items<ref name="DoSN">{{JournalCite|13|Day of the Sepulchral Night (short story)}}</ref>

==Notable non-native speakers of Sriluurian==
